zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy de Montmorency, seigneur de Laval於1170年1月22日出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延賴伐爾時，他的父親Guy IV de LAVAL41歲，母親Emma de CORNOUAILLES31歲。他和Avoise de Craon至少有3個女兒。他去世於1211年9月9日在他的家鄉享年41歲，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延奧利維特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy de Montmorency, seigneur de Laval于1170年1月22日出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延賴伐爾时，他的父亲Guy IV de LAVAL41岁，母亲Emma de CORNOUAILLES31岁。他和Avoise de Craon至少有3个女儿。他去世于1211年9月9日在他的家乡享年41岁，埋葬在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延奧利維特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Laval
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, Old French val (originally feminine, later masculine; see Val , compare Lavallee ), or a habitational name from Laval, the name of several places in various parts of France, ultimately derived from Latin vallis ‘valley’.

variants.name: Val
meanings: Spanish: variant of Valle , from val, a variant of valle ‘valley’. Compare Delval .
Galician and Portuguese: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, val (compare 3 below). Compare also Doval .

French and Haitian: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, (Old) French val (originally feminine, later masculine; compare Vallee ), from Latin vallis (feminine). Compare Duval and Laval .

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Guy de Montmorency, seigneur de Laval was born on 22 January 1170, in Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Guy IV de LAVAL, was 41 and his mother, Emma de CORNOUAILLES, was 31. He had at least 3 daughters with Avoise de Craon. He died on 9 September 1211, in his hometown, at the age of 41, and was buried in Olivet, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy de Montmorency, seigneur de Laval est né le 22 janvier 1170, à Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Guy IV de LAVAL, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Emma de CORNOUAILLES, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 filles avec Avoise de Craon. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1211, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Olivet, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guy de Montmorency, seigneur de Laval am 22. Januar 1170 in Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy IV de LAVAL 41 und seine Mutter Emma de CORNOUAILLES 31. Er hatte mit Avoise de Craon mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 9. September 1211 im Alter von 41 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Olivet, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy de Montmorency, seigneur de Laval è nato il il 22 gennaio 1170 nel Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, il suo padre, Guy IV de LAVAL, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Emma de CORNOUAILLES, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figlie con Avoise de Craon. Morì il 9 settembre 1211, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a Olivet, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy de Montmorency, seigneur de Lavalが1170年1月22日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンラヴァルで生まれた時，父Guy IV de LAVALは41歳，母Emma de CORNOUAILLESは31歳であった。彼はAvoise de Craonとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1211年9月9日に故郷で41歳で死去し，フランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンオリベトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guy de Montmorency, seigneur de Laval(이)가 1170년 1월 22일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 라발에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy IV de LAVAL(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de CORNOUAILLES(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Avoise de Craon(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1211년 9월 9일 그의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 라이베트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy de Montmorency, seigneur de Laval nasceu em 22 de janeiro de 1170, em Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Guy IV de LAVAL, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Emma de CORNOUAILLES, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhas com Avoise de Craon. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1211, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em Olivet, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy de Montmorency, seigneur de Laval родился 22 января 1170 г. в местности лаваль, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Guy IV de LAVAL было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Emma de CORNOUAILLES, 31. У него было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Avoise de Craon. Он умер 9 сентября 1211 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности оливет, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guy de Montmorency, seigneur de Laval nació el 22 de enero de 1170, en Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia, su papá, Guy IV de LAVAL, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Emma de CORNOUAILLES, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con Avoise de Craon. Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1211, en su pueblo, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en Olivet, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia.
